Title: Bob's Burgers
Actors: H. Jon Benjamin, Dan Mintz, Eugene Mirman
Plot: Bob's Burgers centers on the Belcher family (Bob, Linda, Tina, Gene, and Louise) who own a hamburger restaurant. Bob's burgers are really delicious and appear to be better than his rivals' but his kids aren't really helpful at selling them, as more customers head over to Jimmy Pesto's restaurant.
Awards: Won 2 Primetime Emmys. 24 wins & 114 nominations total
